diagrams.title: Cayley Table for V4
diagrams.description: Complete multiplication table showing operation results for all element pairs in Klein 4-Group
diagrams.purpose: Visualize group operation structure and verify abelian property

diagrams.title: Rectangle Symmetries as V4
diagrams.description: Four geometric symmetries of a rectangle forming V4: original position, vertical flip, horizontal flip, 180° rotation
diagrams.purpose: Understand real-world application of V4 in symmetry groups

diagrams.title: Subgroup Lattice of V4
diagrams.description: Hasse diagram showing inclusion relationships between all five subgroups of V4
elements: Three subgroups of order 2 in middle
diagrams.purpose: Visualize subgroup structure and Lagrange's theorem in action

diagrams.title: V4 Isomorphic to Z2×Z2
diagrams.description: Mapping diagram showing correspondence between V4 elements and ordered pairs in Z2×Z2
diagrams.purpose: Understand isomorphism concept and direct product structure
